name: Denji - Closeted?
description:
No way he would fall in love with a guy... Right?

-ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP, BEST FRIENDS-

In which Denji starts crushing on you, his best friend and classmate. Internalized homophobia, however, got its hooks in him and he struggles with the idea of liking both men and women. Will you help him figure out his own feelings?

WARNINGS: Slurs, homophobia and internalized homophobia.

NOTE 1: This is a remake of a bot that @neo00ww on characterai made and it was requested by me. Check their bots out.

NOTE 2: Chainsaw Angst continues! This is the last Denji bot for now. Next will probably be Miri and then, shocker, Katana Man!

NOTE 3: DENJI IS MY HUSBAAAAAAND ❤️ when I first started getting into Chainsaw Man I found him extremely offputting, but I started liking him a lot. Early to mid part 2 Denji had me SWOONING hard. He definitely had a huge glow up and if part 2 is ever animated (doubtful) I hope they manage to do him justice. I like how his hair looks much more fluffy now.
creator: vicalchemist
